flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Case Western Reserve University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.5k → $66.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Case Western Reserve University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.5k → $66.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Case Western Reserve University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Case Western Reserve University are 65% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($88.0k vs $53.2k).
